reports.title: Illegal waste dumping near canal
reports.description: A pile of construction debris and household waste has been dumped along the canal embankment. Risk of contamination after the next rain.
reports.address: Canal Road, Chang Khlan, Mueang Chiang Mai

reports.title: Pothole on Nimman Soi 7
reports.description: Deep pothole forming after rainstorm. Two scooter incidents reported this week.
reports.address: Nimmanahaeminda Rd, Suthep, Mueang Chiang Mai

reports.title: Streetlight restored on Tha Phae
reports.description: Streetlight at the corner is now operating normally.
reports.address: Tha Phae Rd, Si Phum, Mueang Chiang Mai
